response.justification: Strong technical background with 18+ years of development experience and a clear track record in developer tooling adjacent areas (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD setup, MCP/agent tooling, Selenium training). However, the resume reads as a senior individual contributor — there is no explicit people management, team lead, or organizational-change experience, which are core requirements for this Level II Manager role. A screening call is warranted to verify whether informal leadership experience exists that the resume does not surface.
strengths: Deep, long-standing experience building developer tools and testing frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD pipelines)
Strong testing/quality culture: TDD advocate, taught Selenium courses, ran refactoring dojos and code katas
Some mobile-platform exposure (iOS, Apple TV app maintenance, mobile device orchestration tooling)
concerns: No explicit people management or direct-report leadership experience shown on the resume
No demonstrated experience leading organizational change at the scope this role expects
Developer-tools work is broad but not specifically focused on large-scale build systems for mobile ecosystems
